info.name: Vera Bot — magicpin AI Challenge
info.description:
Complete API test suite for the Vera AI merchant assistant bot.

Base URL: http://localhost:8080

Endpoints:
1. GET  /v1/healthz     — Liveness probe
2. GET  /v1/metadata    — Bot identity
3. POST /v1/context     — Push context (category/merchant/customer/trigger)
4. POST /v1/tick        — Periodic wake-up; bot decides what to send
5. POST /v1/reply       — Handle merchant/customer reply
6. POST /v1/teardown    — Wipe state (end of test)

Run in this order:
  Phase 1 → Healthz → Metadata
  Phase 2 → Push Category → Push Merchant → Push Customer → Push Trigger
  Phase 3 → Tick (bot composes message)
  Phase 4 → Reply (multi-turn conversation)
  Phase 5 → Teardown

request.description:
Liveness probe. Returns uptime and count of loaded contexts.

cURL:
curl -s http://localhost:8080/v1/healthz

Bot identity — team name, model, approach.

cURL:
curl -s http://localhost:8080/v1/metadata

Push the dentists CategoryContext. Returns accepted=true with ack_id.

cURL:
curl -s -X POST http://localhost:8080/v1/context \
  -H 'Content-Type: application/json' \
  -d '{"scope":"category","context_id":"dentists","version":1,"delivered_at":"2026-04-26T09:45:00Z","payload":{"slug":"dentists","voice":{"tone":"peer_clinical","vocab_taboo":["guaranteed"]},"offer_catalog":[{"id":"den_001","title":"Dental Cleaning @ ₹299","value":"299"}],"peer_stats":{"avg_ctr":0.030},"digest":[{"id":"d_2026W17_jida_fluoride","kind":"research","title":"3-month fluoride recall cuts caries 38% better","source":"JIDA Oct 2026, p.14","trial_n":2100}],"patient_content_library":[],"seasonal_beats":[],"trend_signals":[]}}'
Push Dr. Meera's MerchantContext. Note category_slug must match a pushed category.
Push Priya's CustomerContext (lapsed_soft patient of Dr. Meera).
Push a research_digest trigger for Dr. Meera. Links to the JIDA fluoride digest item.
Push a customer-scoped recall_due trigger for Priya. Bot should compose a merchant_on_behalf message with slot options.
Push a perf_dip trigger (calls dropped 50%). Bot should use loss aversion framing.
Send version 0 for dentists (already at v1) — expect 409 stale_version response.
Send invalid scope — expect 400 invalid_scope response.

Tick with no triggers — bot should return empty actions array.

cURL:
curl -s -X POST http://localhost:8080/v1/tick \
  -H 'Content-Type: application/json' \
  -d '{"now":"2026-04-26T10:30:00Z","available_triggers":[]}'

⚠️ Requires GEMINI_API_KEY in .env

Bot composes a research_digest message for Dr. Meera using JIDA fluoride trial data.
Expect: clinical peer tone, 38%/2100 patients citation, open_ended CTA.

cURL:
curl -s -X POST http://localhost:8080/v1/tick \
  -H 'Content-Type: application/json' \
  -d '{"now":"2026-04-26T10:30:00Z","available_triggers":["trg_001_research_digest_dentists"]}'

⚠️ Requires GEMINI_API_KEY in .env

Bot composes a customer-facing recall message for Priya, sent on behalf of Dr. Meera's clinic.
Expect: send_as=merchant_on_behalf, hi-en mix, slot options (Reply 1 / Reply 2).

⚠️ Requires GEMINI_API_KEY in .env

Bot composes a loss-aversion message about calls dropping 50%.
Expect: specific numbers, offer to fix, binary YES/STOP CTA.

⚠️ Requires GEMINI_API_KEY in .env

Multiple triggers in one tick — bot should return up to 3 actions (one per trigger).
Note: research_digest trigger is already suppressed from the previous tick call.

body.raw:
{
  "conversation_id": "conv_m_001_drmeera_dentist_delhi_trg_001_research_digest_dentists",
  "merchant_id": "m_001_drmeera_dentist_delhi",
  "customer_id": null,
  "from_role": "merchant",
  "message": "Yes, send me the abstract. Also draft the patient WhatsApp please.",
  "received_at": "2026-04-26T10:46:00Z",
  "turn_number": 2
}

request.description:
⚠️ Run after the research_digest tick.
Merchant accepts — bot should switch to action mode immediately (no more qualifying questions).

conversation_id must match what /v1/tick returned.

cURL:
curl -s -X POST http://localhost:8080/v1/reply \
  -H 'Content-Type: application/json' \
  -d '{"conversation_id":"conv_m_001_drmeera_dentist_delhi_trg_001_research_digest_dentists","merchant_id":"m_001_drmeera_dentist_delhi","from_role":"merchant","message":"Yes, send me the abstract","received_at":"2026-04-26T10:46:00Z","turn_number":2}'

Merchant rejects in Hindi — bot should detect rejection and return action=end with a polite exit.
Expect: action=end, graceful Hindi/Hinglish farewell.

body.raw:
{
  "conversation_id": "conv_m_001_drmeera_dentist_delhi_trg_001_research_digest_dentists",
  "merchant_id": "m_001_drmeera_dentist_delhi",
  "customer_id": null,
  "from_role": "merchant",
  "message": "Aapki jaankari ke liye bahut-bahut shukriya. Main aapki yeh sabhi baatein aur sujhaav hamari team tak pahuncha deti hoon.",
  "received_at": "2026-04-26T10:48:00Z",
  "turn_number": 2
}

request.description:
Classic WhatsApp Business auto-reply (Hindi). Bot should detect it and attempt one retry — NOT exit immediately.
Expect: action=send with a re-engagement message addressed to owner/manager.

body.raw:
{
  "conversation_id": "conv_m_001_drmeera_dentist_delhi_trg_001_research_digest_dentists",
  "merchant_id": "m_001_drmeera_dentist_delhi",
  "customer_id": null,
  "from_role": "merchant",
  "message": "Yeh fluoride varnish kahan se milega? Aur kitna costly hai?",
  "received_at": "2026-04-26T10:49:00Z",
  "turn_number": 2
}

request.description:
⚠️ Requires GEMINI_API_KEY

Merchant asks a specific question in Hinglish. Bot should answer specifically using context data.

Wipe all state. Run at end of test session.

cURL:
curl -s -X POST http://localhost:8080/v1/teardown
